# nerdctl_volume (Resource)

A named volume managed by nerdctl.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nerdctl_volume" "config" {
  name = "app_config"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Volume name, unique on the host.

### Read-Only

- `mountpoint` (String) Directory on the host backing the volume.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import nerdctl_volume.config app_config
```
